item.title: Wise Foods Inc: Wise Onion Rings, 3.75 oz, metalized film in cardboard cartons, 14 bags per case, Recall
item.product: Wise Onion Rings, 3.75 oz, metalized film in cardboard cartons, 14 bags per case,
item.summary: The product contains undeclared Yellow 5 and 6, Blue 1, and unapproved Red 3. Product details: Wise Onion Rings, 3.75 oz, metalized film in cardboard cartons, 14 bags per case,
item.affectedPeople: The adulterated product was distributed to the following States: NC, VA, PA, NJ, NY, SC, FL
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
